short_description: Configure cross-validation strategy for downstream modeling functions
long_description:
Set up cross-validation parameters once and route to any compatible modeling function. Disable with use_cv=False to run without CV.

Data Compatibility:
Works with univariate (2D) and multiway (3D, 4D, etc.) data:
- Univariate: (n_samples, n_variables) or (n_samples, n_responses)
- Multiway: (n_samples, n_wavelengths, n_time) or (n_samples, n_wavelengths, n_time, n_electrodes), etc.
Splitting always occurs on axis 0 (samples), preserving all other dimensions.

Supported Strategies:
1. LOOCV (Leave-One-Out): Each sample left out once; most thorough but expensive
2. K-Fold: Divides data into k equal folds; trains on k-1, validates on 1
3. Stratified K-Fold: Preserves class proportions in each fold (for classification)
4. Time Series: Forward-chaining validation respecting temporal order (no lookahead bias)
5. Repeated K-Fold: Multiple iterations of K-Fold with different random splits
6. Shuffle Split: Random repeated train/test splits (good for large datasets)
7. Venetian Blinds: Deterministic periodic split (every k-th sample per fold; no shuffle)
8. Moving Window: Sliding train window with forward holdout test block
9. Bootstrap (OOB): Random sampling with replacement; Out-of-Bag test set

Note: Reference keys, metrics, and captured outputs are configured by each model function, not here.

layout.name: use_cv
layout.label: Enable Cross-Validation
layout.tooltip: Enable/disable CV; if false, downstream functions run single fit on all data

layout.name: cv_strategy
layout.label: CV Strategy
layout.tooltip: Which CV splitting strategy to use

layout.name: n_splits
layout.label: Number of Splits/Folds
layout.tooltip: Typical: 3-10 (more folds = more compute time). For LOOCV, this is auto-set to n_samples. For Bootstrap, number of iterations.

layout.name: random_state
layout.label: Random State (Seed)
layout.tooltip: For reproducibility; leave blank for random seed

layout.name: stratify_layer
layout.label: Class Layer
layout.tooltip: Class layer index used for stratification (1 = first class layer)

layout.name: window_size
layout.label: Window Size (Moving Window)
layout.tooltip: Training window size for moving window CV. If blank, auto-calculated from n_samples and n_splits

layout.name: n_repeats
layout.label: Number of Repeats (Repeated K-Fold)
layout.tooltip: Number of times to repeat K-Fold with different random splits (default: 10)

layout.name: test_size
layout.label: Test Set Size (Shuffle Split)
layout.tooltip: Proportion of samples for test set (default: 0.2 = 20%; range: 0.0-1.0)

layout.name: shuffle
layout.label: Shuffle Before Splitting
layout.tooltip: Randomize order before splitting (recommended for IID data; not applicable to Venetian Blinds, Time Series, Repeated K-Fold, Shuffle Split, Moving Window, LOOCV, or Bootstrap)
